title: Animations+
description: Aims to recreate the 'Auctions & Stuff' resource pack from Minecraft Bedrock Edition, with additional features.
body:
# DISCLAIMER‼
**This modpack includes the [InvMove](https://modrinth.com/mod/invmove) mod. Please note that some multiplayer servers may restrict or prohibit its use.**

# ![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fbb84e6cec281a9566ae3632fdea889cd0bd9b42.png)
## 🎉 Animations+
**Animations+** is a promising modpack that seeks to recreate the **_Auctions & Stuff_** resource pack from **Minecraft Bedrock Marketplace** for **Minecraft Java Edition** with additional features that offers an immersive experience.

## ✨ Features
- Performance-Optimized.
- Enhanced Animations.
- Client-Side Only.
- Vanilla-Friendly.
- Custom Textures.
- Revamped UI and HUD.
- Immersive Sound Experience.
- Atmospheric Visual Effects.
## 📝 Credits
- This modpack is inspired by this video by **[demonjoeTV](https://modrinth.com/user/demonjoeTV)**. <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/h7gnXPXHT98" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
- The modpack icon and banner use some textures from the **[Whimscape](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/whimscape)** resource pack.
- **Special thanks** to the **[Whimscape](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/whimscape)** resource pack and the **[Hold My Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/hold-my-items)** mod.
